XenotypeDef.label: leeani
XenotypeDef.description:
After escaping a military experiment millennia ago, Leeani have made themselves a prominent presence in the galactic stage. Originally mundane foxes, their genetic modifications have allowed them many opportunities in a growing universe.

Leeani are fox-like humanoids with fluffy tails, digitigrade legs, pointed ears, and vibrant orange fur that never grays with age. They are naturally cheerful, attractive, and psychically sensitive, with a cultural tendency toward pacifism and harmony. Their enhanced movement speed (especially when unencumbered by heavy clothing) and dark vision make them excellent scouts, while their aversion to violence encourages them toward more peaceful pursuits.

As products of early biotech experimentation, Leeani carry both blessings and curses: they're resistant to alcohol and robust enough to eat raw food, but suffer from heat intolerance, minor UV sensitivity, vulnerability to toxins, and a tendency toward uncleanliness. They require more sleep than baseline humans and have reduced fertility with slower gestation periods.

Despite their experimental origins as potential supersoldiers, Leeani are gentle souls who prefer knowledge and psycasting to violence.
XenotypeDef.descriptionShort: Fox-like humanoids with fluffy tails and cheerful dispositions.
